200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

- Either bestows the power of light on the ally with the least health (That ally becomes immune to magic damage for 1 sec). - Deals 22000 pure damage to and blinds the enemy with the least health for 2 sec. The blinded ennemy has a 75% chance of missing the target when attacking. The effect is selected at random.

description 4/6

Once in a while, it applies one of the two effects : - Either bestows the power of light on the ally with the least health (That ally becomes immune to magic damage for 1,5 sec). - Deals 30000 pure damage to and blinds the enemy with the least health for 2 sec. The blinded enemy has a 75% chance of missing the target when attacking. The effect is selected at random. Units located within a long range of the Executioner of Light are affected by his mighty will : - Allies deal an extra 15% damage and take 15% less physical damage. - Enemies cannot be resurrected for 3 sec after getting killed.

description 6/6

Once in a while, applies two powerful effects : - Bestows the power of light on the ally with the least health. That ally becomes immune to magic damage for 2 sec. - Deals 45000 pure damage to and blinds the enemy with the least health. The blinded enemy has a 75% chance of missing the target when attacking. Units located within a long range of the Executioner of Light are affected by his mighty will : - Allies deal an extra 25% damage and take 25% less physical damage. - Enemies cannot be resurrected for 3 sec after getting killed. Their weapon abilities take 2 longer than usual to cooldown. On taking lethal damage, the Executioner of Light moves close to the enemy that was supposed to kill the Executioner to administer justice. - The Executioner restore 50% health in himself +35000 per each live ally (summoned creatures do not count). - Also, he deals 300000 damage to and stuns his target for 3 sec. If the Justice of Light kills the enemy, the effects of the Executioner’s mi


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Instead of dealing 22000 pure damage to the enemy with the least health, Executioner of Light deals it to 2 enemies with the least health.

description 4/6

Instead of dealing 30000 pure damage to the enemy with the least health, Executioner of Light deals it to 2 enemies with the least health. Enemies under the effect of the mighty will take physical damage equal to 200% of the Executioner of Light’s physical armor every 2 sec.

description 6/6

Instead of dealing 45000 pure damage to the enemy with the least health, Executioner of Light deals it to 2 enemies with the least health. Enemies under the effect of the mighty will take physical damage equal to 200% of the Executioner of Light’s physical armor every 2 sec. When administering justice, deals 250000 pure damage to all enemies in a small radius around the target.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

A unit protected by the Executioner of Light from taking magic damage also receives a shield that absorbs 30% physical damage for 5 sec.

description 4/6

A unit protected by the Executioner of Light from taking magic damage also receives a shield that absorbs 30% physical damage for 5 sec. The healing received by allies affected by the mighty will is increased by 75%.

description 6/6

A unit protected by the Executioner of Light from taking magic damage also receives a shield that absorbs 30% physical damage for 5 sec. The healing received by allies affected by the mighty will is increased by 75%. When administering justice, the Executioner of Light gains a shield equal to 80000 for each living ally (summoned creatures do not count). The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for 6 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Instead of being blinded, the enemy with the lowest health is stunned for 2 sec.

description 4/6

Instead of being blinded, the enemy with the lowest health is stunned for 2 sec. Enemies under the effect of the mighty will deal 15% less damage.

description 6/6

Instead of being blinded, the enemy with the lowest health is stunned for 2 sec. Enemies under the effect of the mighty will deal 15% less damage. When administering justice, stunned enemies take 35% more damage for 3 sec.

Materials

Quantum of Mercy
Source of Light
